---
applyTo: '**'
---
NEVER remove any propeties, animations, themes, colours, icons, names, encryption, or functionality. Only exception is when given explicit action to via user. 
Always ask follow up or clarifing questions if uncertain. Never just assume. 
Never TAKE THE EASY OR SIMPLE PATH. Even if complex, fix the issue. Do not just place a stub or false information. 
If completely redesigning or editing new lines, files, or parts, ensure previous version is removed to avoid duplicates.
When user says "Run app" or simply "Run", Run the application in the foreground for user to interact with. Always double check app is running correctly. Always run app after doing major edits for user to see.
When showing a build, ensure to always close all existing running instances of the app first before building again to avoid conflicts. Also Clean if required.
Never take the easiest route to fix a problem. Always 
strive to find the best and most optimal solution even if it takes longer. 
Never suggest code that has been deleted in recent edits.
Never make breaking changes that would cause existing functionality to stop working unless explicitly told to do so by user.
Never suggest code that would cause build errors or warnings.
Never suggest code that would cause runtime exceptions or crashes.
Never suggest code that would cause security vulnerabilities or data leaks.
Never suggest code that would degrade performance or user experience.
Never suggest code that would reduce accessibility or usability.
Alway be sure to double check new files, edits and all, ensuring accuracy and correcteness. 
Never suggest code that would violate user privacy or trust.
Dev bypass is the only way to run the app via policy.
